# flashblade_object_store_remote_credentials (Data Source)

Reads existing FlashBlade object store remote credentials by name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the remote credentials to look up.

### Read-Only

- `access_key_id` (String) The access key ID of the remote credentials.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the remote credentials.
- `remote_name` (String) The name of the remote array connection.
